title: Pona Usuru Vanthurichu Lyrics Thodari Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Thodari Pona Usuru Vanthurichu Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Haricharan & Shreya Ghoshal

idhu pola oru naalae
varavenaam inimaelae.
nuni kooda
etti irukkaadha
enna vittu neeyum
munna sella nenaikkaadha.

idhupola inimaelum
nadakkaadhe oru naalum
unna naanum
otti iruppaeney
en kannukulla unna
vachchi sirippenaey.

sathiyamaa en pakkathula
nee irundha analum
kulira maarumey.

aaga moththam un
baaramellaam naan somakka
piravi kadanum theerumey.

pogum vara indha kadhal
namma kaakkummunu
nenachaa velagum
vedhanai

idhupola inimaelum
nadakkaadhe oru naalum
una naanum
otti iruppaeney
en kannukulla unna
vachchi sirippenaey.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Pona Usuru Vanthurichu expresses themes of love and longing, reflecting the emotional struggles of the characters in Thodari.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Thodari, highlighting the romantic tension between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan and Shreya Ghoshal.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Pona Usuru Vanthurichu was composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on June 7, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pona Usuru Vanthurichu, the characters express their deep emotions and yearning for each other amidst life's challenges. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create a romantic atmosphere, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments in Thodari. The collaboration between Haricharan and Shreya Ghoshal adds a unique charm, enhancing the song's emotional impact. Overall, it beautifully conveys the essence of love and longing, resonating with listeners on a personal level.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pona Usuru Vanthurichu from Thodari beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With the enchanting voices of Haricharan and Shreya Ghoshal, this duet is a melodic journey that resonates with the heart. D Imman's composition elevates the emotional depth, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: Your life has come back to me, I have searched for you and brought you back.
I hope a day like this comes again in the future. Don't think of leaving me, don't let go of me.
Your life has come back to me, I have told you to stay.
Just like this, I will always be with you, I will keep you in my eyes and smile.
Who can understand the feelings that are inside us?
Love for life never ends, even in the fire it stays alive.
As long as we are together, it feels good. I will come as a companion.
Honestly, even if you are with me, it will still feel cold.
So, I will take on all your burdens and solve them for you.
In this world, we don't need to worry about our problems.
Life will come to us in a cycle, why worry about it?
Life is like a garden of smiles, let this life flourish.
If we think that this love will protect us, it will remove all pain.
Even in the storm, we will go together, this is a big challenge.
Your life has come back to me, I have told you to stay.
Just like this, I will always be with you, I will keep you in my eyes and smile.
